case_title: SAMUELS LUCILLE vs. JUNG VICTOR et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-08-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CONTINUED FROM 7/8/96: FOR OUTCOME OF MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD. OSC CALENDAR OF AUG-07-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON AUG-07-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), CONTINUED OSC TO PLTF FOR OUTCOME OF MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD. OSC CALENDAR OF MAY-28-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), FOR OUTCOME OF MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD. PLAINTIFF'S PRESENT ATTORNEY TO NOTIFY PLAINTIFF OF NEW DATE. IF NO APPEARANCE AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE COURT WILL DISMISS CASE. HEARING SET FOR JUL-08-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-25-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-25-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: AS TO WHY THIS ACTION SHOULD NOT BE DISMISSED AND TO RESPOND TO THE COURT'S FACT FINDING INQUIRY INTO COUNSEL'S ROLE IN THE ABOVE MENTIONED PARTY'S FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL COURT DELAY REDUCTION ACT AND THE LOCAL RULES OF COURT., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-20-1996 CONTINUED FROM APR-25-1996 TO MAY-28-1996 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAMUELS LUCILLE HEARING SET FOR JUN-12-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF JUN-12-1996, DENIED FAILED TO APPEAR FOR HEARING.
ORDER APPROVING MOTION TO WITHDRAW AS ATTORNEY OF RECORD
OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-06-1996, DISMISSAL THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF IN CONTEMPT.

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-26-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAR-26-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR APR-25-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD, CALENDAR OF AUG-12-1996, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER NO OPPOSITION; COUNSEL TO PREPARE NEW PROPOSED ORDER.
